data.body:
Need a picture of a giraffe urgently but don't have time to type 'giraffe' into google image search? 

Just search for 'horse' instead (2 fewer letters so you'll save time). Then simply download a horse picture, import it into Photoshop and then elongate the neck. Basically the same animal 👍
